# dojo-kit.yaml Schema

Configuration file that describes a project's stack, structure, and conventions. Generated by `dojo-kit-init` and editable by hand.

## Value Conventions

| Notation | Meaning |
|---|---|
| Present value | Decided — this is what the project uses |
| `~` (YAML null) | Undecided — will be resolved later |
| Absent key | Not applicable to this project |

## Complete Shape

```yaml
# Generated by dojo-kit init — edit freely

project:
  name: my-app                    # Project name (from package.json)
  type: single-app | monorepo    # Project structure
  packageManager: pnpm | npm | yarn | bun
  language: typescript | javascript

apps:
  - name: web                     # App name (package name or directory)
    framework: next | remix | astro | vite | none
    rendering: ssr | ssg | spa | hybrid
    port: 3000                    # Dev server port

libraries:
  state: zustand | redux-toolkit | jotai | valtio | none
  dataFetching: react-query | swr | apollo | urql | none
  forms: react-hook-form | formik | react-form | none
  validation: zod | yup | valibot | effect-schema | none
  styling: tailwind | styled-components | emotion | vanilla-extract | css-modules | none
  testing:
    unit: vitest | jest | none
    integration: testing-library | none
    e2e: playwright | cypress | none
  ui: radix | headless-ui | shadcn | mantine | none

# Only present for monorepos
packages:
  - name: "@scope/package-name"   # Package name from its package.json
    path: packages/package-name   # Relative path from repo root
    type: platform | react | tooling
    description: ~                # Short description of the package's purpose

docs:
  components: storybook | none
  api: swagger | graphql-playground | none

servers:
  api:
    type: rest | graphql | trpc | none
    runtime: node | edge | none
```

## Field Descriptions

### `project`

Top-level project metadata. Always present.

| Field | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `name` | Yes | From `package.json` `name` field |
| `type` | Yes | `single-app` or `monorepo` |
| `packageManager` | Yes | Detected from lockfile |
| `language` | Yes | `typescript` if `tsconfig.json` exists |

### `apps`

List of applications in the project. Single-app projects have one entry. Monorepos may have multiple.

| Field | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `name` | Yes | App identifier |
| `framework` | Yes | Detected from dependencies |
| `rendering` | No | SSR, SSG, SPA, or hybrid |
| `port` | No | Dev server port if detectable |

### `libraries`

Detected library choices. Only include categories where a library is detected or explicitly chosen.

### `packages`

Only present for monorepos. Lists workspace packages with their type classification.

| Type | Meaning |
|---|---|
| `platform` | Infrastructure code (no React dependency) |
| `react` | React components or hooks (React as peer dep) |
| `tooling` | Build tools, configs, scripts |

### `docs`

Documentation tooling. Omit entirely if none detected.

### `servers`

Backend API configuration. Omit entirely if the project is frontend-only.
